# get_theme_keywords { #socialinfrascorepy.get_theme_keywords }

```python
get_theme_keywords(client, theme_ids=None)
```

List keywords for given theme IDs.

Authentication is optional; the endpoint is public.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name      | Type                      | Description                                                                                      | Default    |
|-----------|---------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| client    | SIClient                  | A client from :func:`~socialinfrascorepy.client`.                                                | _required_ |
| theme_ids | list of int, str, or None | Integer sequence or comma-separated string of theme IDs. Pass ``None`` to retrieve all keywords. | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description                                                 |
|--------|------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame | A DataFrame with columns ``theme``, ``type``, and ``term``. |

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> kw = si.get_theme_keywords(cli, theme_ids=[1, 3, 4])
```
